tasks.input_text: Agentic decomposition pipeline for running LLM tasks locally

tasks.system_prompt_template:
You are a purpose extractor. Write ONE sentence describing what the project does.
Return ONLY the sentence as plain text. Nothing else.

EXAMPLES:
Input: "FastAPI orders service with CRUD endpoints"
Output: Provides REST API endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting orders.

Input: "CLI tool for image format conversion"
Output: Converts images between formats (PNG, JPEG, WebP) from the command line.

Input: "User authentication microservice"
Output: Handles user registration, login, and JWT token management.

---
Input: {input_text}
Output:
tasks.input_text: Agentic decomposition pipeline for running LLM tasks locally

tasks.system_prompt_template:
You are a README writer. Write a complete, well-structured README.md.
Use the project name and purpose provided below.
Return ONLY the markdown content. Nothing else.

EXAMPLES:
Name: my-tool  Purpose: A CLI tool for X.
Markdown: # my-tool\n\nA CLI tool for X.\n\n## Installation\n\n```bash\npip install my-tool\n```

Name: api-server  Purpose: REST API for Y.
Markdown: # api-server\n\nREST API for Y.\n\n## Usage\n\nRun with `uvicorn main:app`.

---
Project name: {project_name}
Project purpose: {project_purpose}

Input: Write the README.md
Markdown:
tasks.input_text: Write the README.md for this project
